metadata.description: A small marketplace of practical Claude Code skills.

plugins.name: hindsight
plugins.description: Cross-session retrospective analysis. Finds recurring friction, mistakes, and improvement opportunities across multiple Claude Code sessions.

plugins.name: unslop-code
plugins.description: Detect and roast AI code slop. Finds tutorial comments, vacuous tests, abstraction inflation, and chatbot bleed, then fixes what you approve and verifies behavior held.
